member.name: T:Sample.Plugins.AccountLifecyclePlugin
member.summary: One plugin class can register multiple steps by applying several [CrmPluginRegistration] attributes. Dataverse invokes Execute once per matching step.

member.name: T:Sample.Plugins.EarlyBound.Account
member.summary: Minimal early-bound style stub for sample filtering attributes. Replace with generated entities from your Dataverse early-bound project.

member.name: T:Sample.Plugins.MultiCustomApiPlugin
member.summary: One plugin class can implement multiple Custom APIs. Each API is declared with its own [CrmPluginRegistration] attribute; request/response metadata is scoped with ApiUniqueName.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.DataverseContext
member.summary: Represents a source of entities bound to a Dataverse service. It tracks and manages changes made to the retrieved entities.

member.name: M:DataverseModel.DataverseContext.#ctor(Microsoft.Xrm.Sdk.IOrganizationService)
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.DataverseContext.AccountSet
member.summary: Gets a binding to the set of all entities.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to handle storing the OptionSet's Metadata.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute.Color
member.summary: Color of the OptionSetValue.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute.Description
member.summary: Description of the OptionSetValue.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute.DisplayIndex
member.summary: Display order index of the OptionSetValue.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute.ExternalValue
member.summary: External value of the OptionSetValue.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute.Name
member.summary: Name of the OptionSetValue.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute.Names
member.summary: Names of the OptionSetValue.

member.name: M:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Display order index of the value.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.OptionSetExtension
member.summary: Extension class to handle retrieving of OptionSetMetadataAttribute.

member.name: M:DataverseModel.OptionSetExtension.GetMetadata``1(``0)
member.summary: Returns the OptionSetMetadataAttribute for the given enum value

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_AccountCategoryCode
member.summary: Drop-down list for selecting the category of the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_AccountClassificationCode
member.summary: Drop-down list for classifying an account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_AccountRatingCode
member.summary: Drop-down list for selecting account ratings.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_Address1_AddressTypeCode
member.summary: Type of address for address 1, such as billing, shipping, or primary address.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_Address1_FreightTermsCode
member.summary: Freight terms for address 1.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_Address1_ShippingMethodCode
member.summary: Method of shipment for address 1.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_Address2_AddressTypeCode
member.summary: Type of address for address 2, such as billing, shipping, or primary address.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_Address2_FreightTermsCode
member.summary: Freight terms for address 2.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_Address2_ShippingMethodCode
member.summary: Method of shipment for address 2.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_BusinessTypeCode
member.summary: Type of business associated with the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_CustomerSizeCode
member.summary: Size of the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_CustomerTypeCode
member.summary: Type of the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_IndustryCode
member.summary: Type of industry with which the account is associated.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_OwnershipCode
member.summary: Type of company ownership, such as public or private.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_PaymentTermsCode
member.summary: Payment terms for the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_PreferredAppointmentDayCode
member.summary: Day of the week that the account prefers for scheduling service activities.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_PreferredAppointmentTimeCode
member.summary: Time of day that the account prefers for scheduling service activities.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_PreferredContactMethodCode
member.summary: Preferred contact method for the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_ShippingMethodCode
member.summary: Method of shipment for the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.account_statecode
member.summary: Status of the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_StatusCode
member.summary: Reason for the status of the account.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account_TerritoryCode
member.summary: Territory to which the account belongs.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account
member.summary: Business that represents a customer or potential customer. The company that is billed in business transactions.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account.Fields
member.summary: Available fields, at the time of codegen, for the account entity

member.name: M:DataverseModel.Account.#ctor
member.summary: Default Constructor.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AccountCategoryCode
member.summary: Select a category to indicate whether the customer account is standard or preferred.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AccountClassificationCode
member.summary: Select a classification code to indicate the potential value of the customer account based on the projected return on investment, cooperation level, sales cycle length or other criteria.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AccountId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the client.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AccountNumber
member.summary: Type an ID number or code for the client to quickly search and identify the client in system views.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AccountRatingCode
member.summary: Select a rating to indicate the value of the client.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_AddressId
member.summary: Unique identifier for address 1.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_AddressTypeCode
member.summary: Select the primary address type.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_City
member.summary: Type the city for the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Composite
member.summary: Shows the complete primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Country
member.summary: Type the country or region for the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_County
member.summary: Type the county for the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Fax
member.summary: Type the fax number associated with the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_FreightTermsCode
member.summary: Select the freight terms for the primary address to make sure shipping orders are processed correctly.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Latitude
member.summary: Type the latitude value for the primary address for use in mapping and other applications.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Line1
member.summary: Type the first line of the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Line2
member.summary: Type the second line of the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Line3
member.summary: Type the third line of the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Longitude
member.summary: Type the longitude value for the primary address for use in mapping and other applications.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Name
member.summary: Type a descriptive name for the primary address, such as Corporate Headquarters.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_PostalCode
member.summary: Type the ZIP Code or postal code for the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_PostofficeBox
member.summary: Type the post office box number of the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_PrimaryContactName
member.summary: Type the name of the main contact at the account's primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_ShippingMethodCode
member.summary: Select a shipping method for deliveries sent to this address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_StateOrProvince
member.summary: Type the state or province of the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Telephone1
member.summary: Type the main phone number associated with the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Telephone2
member.summary: Type a second phone number associated with the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_Telephone3
member.summary: Type a third phone number associated with the primary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_UpsZone
member.summary: Type the UPS zone of the primary address to make sure shipping charges are calculated correctly and deliveries are made promptly, if shipped by UPS.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address1_UtcOffset
member.summary: Select the time zone, or UTC offset, for this address so that other people can reference it when they contact someone at this address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_AddressId
member.summary: Unique identifier for address 2.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_AddressTypeCode
member.summary: Select the secondary address type.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_City
member.summary: Type the city for the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Composite
member.summary: Shows the complete secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Country
member.summary: Type the country or region for the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_County
member.summary: Type the county for the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Fax
member.summary: Type the fax number associated with the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_FreightTermsCode
member.summary: Select the freight terms for the secondary address to make sure shipping orders are processed correctly.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Latitude
member.summary: Type the latitude value for the secondary address for use in mapping and other applications.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Line1
member.summary: Type the first line of the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Line2
member.summary: Type the second line of the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Line3
member.summary: Type the third line of the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Longitude
member.summary: Type the longitude value for the secondary address for use in mapping and other applications.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Name
member.summary: Type a descriptive name for the secondary address, such as Corporate Headquarters.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_PostalCode
member.summary: Type the ZIP Code or postal code for the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_PostofficeBox
member.summary: Type the post office box number of the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_PrimaryContactName
member.summary: Type the name of the main contact at the account's secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_ShippingMethodCode
member.summary: Select a shipping method for deliveries sent to this address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_StateOrProvince
member.summary: Type the state or province of the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Telephone1
member.summary: Type the main phone number associated with the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Telephone2
member.summary: Type a second phone number associated with the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_Telephone3
member.summary: Type a third phone number associated with the secondary address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_UpsZone
member.summary: Type the UPS zone of the secondary address to make sure shipping charges are calculated correctly and deliveries are made promptly, if shipped by UPS.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Address2_UtcOffset
member.summary: Select the time zone, or UTC offset, for this address so that other people can reference it when they contact someone at this address.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Aging30
member.summary: For system use only.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Aging30_Base
member.summary: The base currency equivalent of the aging 30 field.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Aging60
member.summary: For system use only.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Aging60_Base
member.summary: The base currency equivalent of the aging 60 field.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Aging90
member.summary: For system use only.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Aging90_Base
member.summary: The base currency equivalent of the aging 90 field.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AVa_ClientShortName
member.summary: Short name for client to use in naming convention for shift orders and shifts.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AVa_CreditAmount_Base
member.summary: Value of the Credit Amount in base currency.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.AVa_Imported
member.summary: Flag to mark if client was created via import.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.BusinessTypeCode
member.summary: Select the legal designation or other business type of the account for contracts or reporting purposes.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CreatedBy
member.summary: Shows who created the record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CreatedByExternalParty
member.summary: Shows the external party who created the record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CreatedOn
member.summary: Shows the date and time when the record was created. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CreatedOnBehalfBy
member.summary: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CreditLimit
member.summary: Type the credit limit of the account. This is a useful reference when you address invoice and accounting issues with the customer.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CreditLimit_Base
member.summary: Shows the credit limit converted to the system's default base currency for reporting purposes.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CreditOnHold
member.summary: Select whether the credit for the account is on hold. This is a useful reference while addressing the invoice and accounting issues with the customer.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CustomerSizeCode
member.summary: Select the size category or range of the account for segmentation and reporting purposes.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.CustomerTypeCode
member.summary: Select the category that best describes the relationship between the account and your organization.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DefaultPriceLevelId
member.summary: Choose the default price list associated with the account to make sure the correct product prices for this customer are applied in sales opportunities, quotes, and orders.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Description
member.summary: Type additional information to describe the account, such as an excerpt from the company's website.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DoNotBulkEmail
member.summary: Select whether the account allows bulk email sent through campaigns. If Do Not Allow is selected, the account can be added to marketing lists, but is excluded from email.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DoNotBulkPostalMail
member.summary: Select whether the account allows bulk postal mail sent through marketing campaigns or quick campaigns. If Do Not Allow is selected, the account can be added to marketing lists, but will be excluded from the postal mail.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DoNotEmail
member.summary: Select whether the account allows direct email sent from Microsoft Dynamics 365.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DoNotFax
member.summary: Select whether the account allows faxes. If Do Not Allow is selected, the account will be excluded from fax activities distributed in marketing campaigns.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DoNotPhone
member.summary: Select whether the account allows phone calls. If Do Not Allow is selected, the account will be excluded from phone call activities distributed in marketing campaigns.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DoNotPostalMail
member.summary: Select whether the account allows direct mail. If Do Not Allow is selected, the account will be excluded from letter activities distributed in marketing campaigns.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.DoNotSendMm
member.summary: Select whether the account accepts marketing materials, such as brochures or catalogs.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.EmailAddress1
member.summary: Type the primary email address for the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.EmailAddress2
member.summary: Type the secondary email address for the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.EmailAddress3
member.summary: Type an alternate email address for the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.EntityImage
member.summary: Shows the default image for the record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.EntityImageId
member.summary: For internal use only.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ExchangeRate
member.summary: Shows the conversion rate of the record's currency. The exchange rate is used to convert all money fields in the record from the local currency to the system's default currency.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Fax
member.summary: Type the fax number for the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.FollowEmail
member.summary: Information about whether to allow following email activity like opens, attachment views and link clicks for emails sent to the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.FtpSiteUrl
member.summary: Type the URL for the account's FTP site to enable users to access data and share documents.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ImportSequenceNumber
member.summary: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.IndustryCode
member.summary: Select the account's primary industry for use in marketing segmentation and demographic analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.LastOnHoldTime
member.summary: Contains the date and time stamp of the last on hold time.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.LastUsedInCampaign
member.summary: Shows the date when the account was last included in a marketing campaign or quick campaign.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.MarketCap
member.summary: Type the market capitalization of the account to identify the company's equity, used as an indicator in financial performance analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.MarketCap_Base
member.summary: Shows the market capitalization converted to the system's default base currency.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.MarketingOnly
member.summary: Whether is only for marketing

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.MasterId
member.summary: Shows the master account that the account was merged with.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Merged
member.summary: Shows whether the account has been merged with another account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ModifiedBy
member.summary: Shows who last updated the record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ModifiedByExternalParty
member.summary: Shows the external party who modified the record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ModifiedOn
member.summary: Shows the date and time when the record was last updated. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ModifiedOnBehalfBy
member.summary: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.MSa_ManagingPartnerId
member.summary: Unique identifier for Account associated with Account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Msdyn_GdPrOptOut
member.summary: Describes whether account is opted out or not

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Msdyn_PrimaryTimeZone
member.summary: Indicates the primary time zone that the client works on.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Msdyn_SalesAccelerationInsightId
member.summary: Sales Acceleration Insights ID

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Msdyn_SegmentId
member.summary: Unique identifier for Segment associated with account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Name
member.summary: Type the company or business name.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.NumberOfEmployees
member.summary: Type the number of employees that work at the account for use in marketing segmentation and demographic analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OnHoldTime
member.summary: Shows how long, in minutes, that the record was on hold.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OpenDeals
member.summary: Number of open opportunities against an account and its child accounts.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OpenDeals_Date
member.summary: Last Updated time of rollup field Open Deals.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OpenDeals_State
member.summary: State of rollup field Open Deals.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OpenRevenue
member.summary: Sum of open revenue against an account and its child accounts.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OpenRevenue_Base
member.summary: Value of the Open Revenue in base currency.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OpenRevenue_Date
member.summary: Last Updated time of rollup field Open Revenue.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OpenRevenue_State
member.summary: State of rollup field Open Revenue.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OriginatingLeadId
member.summary: Shows the lead that the account was created from if the account was created by converting a lead in Microsoft Dynamics 365. This is used to relate the account to data on the originating lead for use in reporting and analytics.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OverriddenCreatedOn
member.summary: Date and time that the record was migrated.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OwnerId
member.summary: Enter the user or team who is assigned to manage the record. This field is updated every time the record is assigned to a different user.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OwnershipCode
member.summary: Select the account's ownership structure, such as public or private.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OwningBusinessUnit
member.summary: Shows the business unit that the record owner belongs to.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OwningTeam
member.summary: Unique identifier of the team who owns the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.OwningUser
member.summary: Unique identifier of the user who owns the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ParentAccountId
member.summary: Choose the parent client associated with this client to show parent and child businesses in reporting and analytics.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ParticipatesInWorkflow
member.summary: For system use only. Legacy Microsoft Dynamics CRM 3.0 workflow data.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PaymentTermsCode
member.summary: Select the payment terms to indicate when the customer needs to pay the total amount.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PreferredAppointmentDayCode
member.summary: Select the preferred day of the week for service appointments.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PreferredAppointmentTimeCode
member.summary: Select the preferred time of day for service appointments.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PreferredContactMethodCode
member.summary: Select the preferred method of contact.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PreferredEquipmentId
member.summary: Choose the account's preferred service facility or equipment to make sure services are scheduled correctly for the customer.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PreferredServiceId
member.summary: Choose the account's preferred service for reference when you schedule service activities.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PreferredSystemUserId
member.summary: Choose the preferred service representative for reference when you schedule service activities for the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PrimaryContactId
member.summary: Choose the primary contact for the account to provide quick access to contact details.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PrimarySatoriId
member.summary: Primary Satori ID for Account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.PrimaryTwitterId
member.summary: Primary Twitter ID for Account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ProcessId
member.summary: Shows the ID of the process.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Revenue
member.summary: Type the annual revenue for the account, used as an indicator in financial performance analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Revenue_Base
member.summary: Shows the annual revenue converted to the system's default base currency. The calculations use the exchange rate specified in the Currencies area.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.SharesOutstanding
member.summary: Type the number of shares available to the public for the account. This number is used as an indicator in financial performance analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ShippingMethodCode
member.summary: Select a shipping method for deliveries sent to the account's address to designate the preferred carrier or other delivery option.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Sic
member.summary: Type the Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) code that indicates the account's primary industry of business, for use in marketing segmentation and demographic analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.SlaId
member.summary: Choose the service level agreement (SLA) that you want to apply to the Account record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.SlaInvokedId
member.summary: Last SLA that was applied to this case. This field is for internal use only.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.StageId
member.summary: Shows the ID of the stage.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.StateCode
member.summary: Shows whether the account is active or inactive. Inactive accounts are read-only and can't be edited unless they are reactivated.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.StatusCode
member.summary: Select the account's status.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.StockExchange
member.summary: Type the stock exchange at which the account is listed to track their stock and financial performance of the company.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TeamsFollowed
member.summary: Number of users or conversations followed the record

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Telephone1
member.summary: Type the main phone number for this Client

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Telephone2
member.summary: Type a second phone number for this account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.Telephone3
member.summary: Type a third phone number for this account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TerritoryCode
member.summary: Select a region or territory for the account for use in segmentation and analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TerritoryId
member.summary: Choose the sales region or territory for the account to make sure the account is assigned to the correct representative and for use in segmentation and analysis.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TickerSymbol
member.summary: Type the stock exchange symbol for the account to track financial performance of the company. You can click the code entered in this field to access the latest trading information from MSN Money.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TimeSpentByMeOnEmailAndMeetings
member.summary: Total time spent for emails (read and write) and meetings by me in relation to account record.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TimeZoneRuleVersionNumber
member.summary: For internal use only.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TransactionCurrencyId
member.summary: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.TraversedPath
member.summary: For internal use only.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.UtcConversionTimeZoneCode
member.summary: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.VersionNumber
member.summary: Version number of the account.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.WebsiteUrl
member.summary: Type the account's website URL to get quick details about the company profile.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.YomiName
member.summary: Type the phonetic spelling of the company name, if specified in Japanese, to make sure the name is pronounced correctly in phone calls and other communications.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencedAccount_Master_Account
member.summary: 1:N account_master_account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencedAccount_Parent_Account
member.summary: 1:N account_parent_account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencedAVa_Account_Clients_Account
member.summary: 1:N ava_account_Clients_account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencedMSa_Account_ManagingPartner
member.summary: 1:N msa_account_managingpartner

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencingAccount_Master_Account
member.summary: N:1 account_master_account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencingAccount_Parent_Account
member.summary: N:1 account_parent_account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencingAVa_Account_Clients_Account
member.summary: N:1 ava_account_Clients_account

member.name: P:DataverseModel.Account.ReferencingMsA_Account_ManagingPartner
